markdown:
# Tiimo: Daily To Do List · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 10, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Glitter Blood_, Jul 14, 2026, 3/5: "Useful app which definitely helps with my adhd task initiation/keeping track, so lots of potential but it is quite buggy - the latest update has meant I can no longer move one days tasks to the next or to a different day - when I click them to move it nothing happens. Also annoying that if you don’t want to schedule specific times to do each task on the daily view tab, you can’t reorder them. Trying to set times is impractical and time consuming unless it’s a specific thing like a meeting, ideally you’d be able to create high to low priority on the day view, or at least reorder them easily so you can see which order you need do the tasks in - every time I try to reorder, even if I seem to successfully move a task up or down, it puts it back to where it was before if I click off that page or close the app. Would also be helpful if completed tasks automatically delete after 30 days or something on the main prioritisation lists."
            2. _Alea-pea_, Jun 23, 2026, 3/5: "I really love this app and it has helped me immensely when it comes to getting organised– although it’s an ongoing process and I’m still learning! If this app worked the way it was intended I would have given it five stars however it often glitches on my iPhone laptop and iPad. These glitches can be very frustrating. I look forward to any improvements and to upgrading my rating to five stars. Many thanks for the app!"
            3. _chilliflakes_, Jul 14, 2026, 4/5: "I like the simple and intuitive UI of the app. It does feel much better than calendar and reminder systems I’ve used in the past already. However, this app is unusable offline, which for me is a shame as I cannot use it while commuting through rural areas (the time I plan my day). I would pay past the trial of it wasn’t for this."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 25, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Damonic_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "I downloaded this app and tried it during the trial period. I canceled the subscription before I was supposed to be charged but they charged me anyway. They refuse to refund the money. Beware before you accept the trial period."
            2. _LatteGirl11_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "I have been given marketed to get 30% off the annual rate and yet it’s the same as the most expensive rate advertised in the Apple App Store. Also, there are lower rates in the “In-App Purchases” section and yet I can’t access those rates. I can’t get a trial period and I can’t get a reduced rate to try to app so I guess I won’t try the app. The most expensive rate is too much to find out this is an app that doesn’t work for me. I’ve tried contacting the company multiple times instead of leaving a review but I have never received a response. Here are all the rates I see and yet the only one offered to me is the one for $54 even when I get a link to get 30% off of the annual rate. That is false advertising. In-App Purchases Tlimo Pro (1 Year) $54.00 Pro (1 Year) $48.00 Pro (1 Year) $54.00 Pro (1 Month) $12.00 Tiimo Pro (1 Month) $12.00 Pro (1 Year) $36.00 Pro (1 Month) $12.00 Pro (1 Month) $7.00 Pro (1 Year) $42.00 Pro (1 Month) $11.99"
            3. _Kathy Orebaugh_, Jun 14, 2026, 1/5: "I had a very unsatisfactory experience. I attempted to cancel my subscription on the final day of the free trial period, but the cancellation did not process successfully. After deleting the application, I made another attempt the following day. However, I was informed that a refund could not be issued due to their established refund policy. The application itself proved challenging to navigate, which ultimately led to my discontinuation of its use. I advise caution regarding their free trial."
